headline: American Express reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, and provided management's financial guidance for 2026.
investor_impact: The release of Q4 2025 results and 2026 EPS/revenue guidance provides critical visibility into AXP's growth trajectory and credit quality. Investors will focus on the success of the recent U.S. Consumer and Business Platinum Card refreshes, momentum in Millennial and Gen-Z cohorts, and credit reserve levels amid macroeconomic uncertainty.
key_figures: Q4 and full year 2025 (Financial periods reported)
2026 (Fiscal year for EPS and revenue growth guidance)
